name: HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_B
description:
This table will be used to store information regarding the Questions being
used in the Survey

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber ID associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber Code associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Question ID associated with the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: QUESTION_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Question Version associated with the Question ID.

columns.Name: QUESTION_OWNER
columns.Comments: This is the FUSION id of the owner of this question.

columns.Name: QUESTION_TYPE
columns.Comments:
This determines the type of this question.
QUESTION_TYPE ::
0 --> Text Questions
1 --> Multiple Choice Questions – Single Selection
2 --> Multiple Choice Questions – Multiple Selection – 2 or more selections are possible
3 --> No Response

columns.Name: QUESTION_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: This determines the timestamp of last action on this question.

columns.Name: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
